variables.notes: OK. The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Employee Benefit Expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses', and earlier notes explicitly excluded D&A from those selections. A separate operating D&A block is visible above financial items, so D&A is not assumed embedded in the selected XSGA rows.
